inputs.label: Real Power
inputs.businessContext: The actual power consumed by the load, measured in kilowatts.

businessContext_i18n.en: The actual power consumed by the load, measured in kilowatts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yük tarafından tüketilen gerçek güç, kilovat cinsinden.

inputs.label: Apparent Power
inputs.businessContext: The total power supplied to the load (vector sum of real and reactive power), measured in kilovolt-amperes.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total power supplied to the load (vector sum of real and reactive power), measured in kilovolt-amperes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüke sağlanan toplam güç (aktif ve reaktif gücün vektörel toplamı), kilovolt-amper cinsinden.

inputs.label: Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Supply voltage in volts (optional, used for VI-based apparent power calculation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Supply voltage in volts (optional, used for VI-based apparent power calculation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besleme gerilimi (volt, isteğe bağlı, VI tabanlı görünür güç hesaplaması için kullanılır).

inputs.label: Current
inputs.businessContext: Supply current in amperes (optional, used for VI-based apparent power calculation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Supply current in amperes (optional, used for VI-based apparent power calculation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besleme akımı (amper, isteğe bağlı, VI tabanlı görünür güç hesaplaması için kullanılır).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
